executionArgs.additionalInstruction: The app uses base path /grapadistrategix/ in production. The login page is at /grapadistrategix/login. Login uses a "login" field (username), not phone. Test user credentials: username: pandu123, password: password. Admin credentials: username: admin, password: admin123. UI language is Indonesian (Bahasa Indonesia). Frontend server is on 0.0.0.0:5173, backend API on localhost:8000. All dashboard navigation is state-based (activeSection/activeSubSection), not URL-based routing. Sidebar menu items navigate between Business Plan, Financial Management, Forecast, Affiliate, and Admin sections.
